channel.title: Orthodox Christian Sermons: Feasts of the Saints:January 22
channel.description: Audio Orthodox Christian Sermons: Feasts of the Saints:January 22

item.title: Feasts of the Saints, Holy New Martyrs and Confessors of Russia, 2013-02-10
item.description: :Feasts of the Saints. The Epistle reading for the Holy New Martyrs and Confessors of Russia, Romans 8:28-39, gives us the common thread that connects all martyrs. Millions in Russia were martyred, but many more millions gave up their faith with nary a struggle. The Martyrs suffered in countless ways, but were united in that that all were living in such a way to be "conformed to the image of the Son of God" Martyrdom is not a discrete event, it is a daily process, which ALL Christians must participate in gladly.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :Feasts of the Saints. The Epistle reading for the Holy New Martyrs and Confessors of Russia, Romans 8:28-39, gives us the common thread that connects all martyrs. Millions in Russia were martyred, but many more millions gave up their faith with nary a struggle. The Martyrs suffered in countless ways, but were united in that that all were living in such a way to be "conformed to the image of the Son of God" Martyrdom is not a discrete event, it is a daily process, which ALL Christians must participate in gladly.
